abilities.name: Thornveil
abilities.effect: Briar Spirit. Single ally gains a thorn barrier — attackers take counter-damage equal to 20% of the shielded ally's Defense for 3 turns. Favor 3 Upgrade (Deeproot Veil): Counter-damage rises to 40% and the barrier also reduces incoming damage by 15%.
abilities.description: Call the Briar Spirit to shield an ally with thorns.

abilities.name: Dewfall
abilities.effect: Rain Spirit. Moderate heal to one ally. Removes Poison status. Favor 3 Upgrade (Torrent's Grace): Heals moderate HP to all allies and removes Poison and Sleep.
abilities.description: Call the Rain Spirit to heal an ally and cleanse poison.

abilities.name: Ember Wing
abilities.effect: Flame Spirit. Flame damage to all enemies. 40% chance to inflict Burn (Flame damage over time, 3 turns). Favor 3 Upgrade (Inferno Gale): Heavy Flame damage to all enemies. Burn is guaranteed.
abilities.description: Call the Flame Spirit to engulf all enemies in fire.

abilities.name: Stoneheart
abilities.effect: Earth Spirit. One ally gains immunity to status effects for 2 turns. Favor 3 Upgrade (Mountain's Resolve): All allies gain status immunity for 2 turns.
abilities.description: Call the Earth Spirit to grant an ally immunity to status effects.

abilities.name: Greyveil
abilities.effect: Twilight Spirit. Deals non-elemental damage that ignores Magic Defense. Effective against Pallor-type enemies. Favor 3 Upgrade (Duskbreaker): Heavy non-elemental damage. If the target is Pallor-corrupted, deals 2x damage and has a 60% chance to dispel Pallor buffs.
abilities.description: Call the Twilight Spirit to strike with non-elemental force.

abilities.name: Convergence Chorus
abilities.effect: Torren calls all known spirits at once. Each spirit performs its ability at 50% normal potency simultaneously — AoE heal, AoE damage, party barrier, and status cleanse in a single action. Usable once per battle.
abilities.description: Call all spirits at once for a devastating combination of effects.

abilities.name: Rootsong
abilities.effect: Torren sings to all spirits at once. Heals all allies for moderate HP each (same per-target potency as Dewfall) AND increases all spirit Favor by 1 (up to max 3). Usable once per battle. The only way to boost Favor for multiple spirits in a single action.
abilities.description: Sing to all spirits, healing allies and deepening spirit bonds.

abilities.name: Purify
abilities.effect: Pallor-zone action. Reverses corrupted spirit effect to correct targets, prevents further corruption for remaining duration. Available only in Pallor-corrupted zones.
abilities.description: Purify a corrupted spirit call, restoring its intended effect.
